title: melicytus ramiflorus subsp. oblongifolius
intro: Melicytus ramiflorus subsp. oblongifolius is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Penaeaceae, commonly known as the 'Hairy Maire'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Melicytus ramiflorus subsp. oblongifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
